title: Faukinator CreateMon
description: Modpack for create and cobblemon mods and addons
body: Explore a world where engineering meets Pokémon! Use the Create mod to build intricate machinery, automate farms, and craft powerful contraptions. Meanwhile, Cobblemon lets you capture, train, and battle Pokémon in a fully immersive experience. With additional addons, discover new Pokémon, unique biomes, and advanced automation to enhance your adventure. Build, battle, and explore like never before!
